remember: Students will be able to recall the causes and procedures of dissolution of a partnership firm.
Students will be able to state the rights of partners during dissolution.
Students will be able to identify the methods of dissolution of a partnership firm.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of dissolution of a partnership firm.
Students will be able to distinguish between dissolution and liquidation.
Students will be able to describe the role of the Board of Partners during dissolution.
apply: Students will be able to apply the provisions of the Partnership Act, 1932, while determining the method of dissolution.
Students will be able to calculate the share of a partner in the assets and liabilities of the firm after dissolution.
Students will be able to prepare a statement of affairs and a statement of dissolution.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the financial position of the firm after dissolution.
Students will be able to evaluate the rights and interests of partners during dissolution.
Students will be able to compare the different methods of dissolution of a partnership firm.

ncert_objectives: Students will be able to explain the concept of dissolution of partnership firm.
Students will be able to describe the procedure of dissolution of a partnership firm.
Students will be able to distinguish between dissolution and liquidation of a partnership firm.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to explain the causes and procedures of dissolution of a partnership firm.
Students will be able to calculate the share of a partner in the assets and liabilities of the firm after dissolution.
Students will be able to prepare a statement of affairs and a statement of dissolution of a partnership firm as per the Partnership Act, 1932.
